channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excessive litter and flytipping side of toilet block next to Co-op and behind Zenith fast food, Mayplace Road, 29th May
item.description:
This accumulation of litter has been here for some time. Why is it not regularly cleared?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin for over 3 days, 29th May
item.description:
Overflowing bin for over 3 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins for at least3 days, 29th May
item.description:
Overflowing bins for at least3 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10inch and 7 inch holes next to my house, 29th May
item.description:
There are 2 holes on the pavement next to my house I had this issue last year and it was resolved but now there's are in a different places.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawes Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole street has had lighting cut - very unsafe, 29th May
item.description:
My landlord (L&Q ) have erected fences and appear to have cut the street lighting creating two dark alleyways that are now really unsafe to walk at night. They run along the pavements o Boat Lane but it is so dark a phone torch is needed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boat Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Large refrigerator abandoned, 29th May
item.description:
Flytipping of large fridge on pathway blocking route
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscourt Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Bag of food dropped in the road and run over by a lorry. Hayles St near Hedger St., 29th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hayles Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maitland Place, Hackney, London

item.title: Just painted my shutter white and they have come and dine this, 29th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Faeces on the pavement in Lamlash Community Gdn, 29th May
item.description:
Could be human!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Power outrage multiple signs, 29th May
item.description:
Traffic island C511 All signs and bollards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 9 / 12 Dorcis Avenue, 29th May
item.description:
Steve at 21 , Fell down manhole as cover missing or stolen, very bruised , also cut elbows , legs , hands and head. A neighbour helped me get out as my wife is disabled and unable to help.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorcis Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of mattresses and other white goods, 29th May
item.description:
Someone has left mattresses, white goods, bags of waste near the car park/next to the playground/close to the general recycling bins which is situated between Fort Road and Balaclava Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balaclava Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by bowling green and park entrance, 29th May
item.description:
Looks like wardrobe doors

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Champion Park SE5, near entrance to Denmark Hill station. Dumped speakers next to WEEE receptacle., 29th May
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increasing signs of antisocial behaviour, 29th May
item.description:
At the end of Fulthorp Road by the barrier, there is ongoing evidence of antisocial behaviour including smart whip canisters, empty alcohol bottles and used condoms. The most recent deposit is shown in the photo, but there have been many more over the previous few weeks. It’s really disgusting given kids walk past here all the time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fulthorp Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement light in. Park is missing, 29th May
item.description:
Light set in the pavement is missing. Forms a trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping In Estate Bins., 29th May
item.description:
On the night of 28/05/2026, a large white van pulled up and began offloading furniture and waste into the bins belonging to the residential building. I have the license plate number as well and can send if needed. There were four gentleman.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milton Gardens Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
